fields.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] infra/gerrit/project.config: set [submit] action = rebase if necessary (was: fast forward only); remove the Autosubmit label definition + label-Autosubmit ACL + the per-ref rebase (rebase-on-behalf) grant that only the bot needed.
- [ ] Revisit Verified copyCondition: under Rebase-If-Necessary Gerrit integrates at submit (no review re-patchset), so confirm the submit requirement still gates on Verified+1 & LLM-Review+1 correctly; document any copyCondition change.
- [ ] Update infra/gerrit/setup-project.sh / smoke-check if they reference the removed label/ACL.
- [ ] [operator-attested] apply refs/meta/config via the admin key (JoeOakhartNava) in a quiet window, announced; DRY_RUN diff first; confirm live submit type = REBASE_IF_NECESSARY and the Autosubmit label is gone.
- [ ] [operator-attested] Verify the new submit behaviour live: a normal change lands via a plain Gerrit Submit (both votes green) under submit_type=REBASE_IF_NECESSARY (fast-forward when on the tip, server-side rebase when behind — Gerrit's built-in Rebase-If-Necessary, enabled by the verified submit_type); a textual-conflict change is refused with the clean 'rebase manually' signal. Attest with the change id(s) + observed outcome.
- [ ] Done LAST in the migration (after code/infra/docs), since it flips production behavior. Back-out: one-line submit-type revert to fast forward only.
